text: R53 Public Hosted Zones T * DNS Database (zone file) hosted by R53 (Public Name Servers) e Accessible from the public internet & VPCs * Hosted on “4" R53 Name servers (NS) specific for the zone e .. use “NS records” to point at these NS (connect to global DNS) * Resource Records (RR) created within the Hosted Zone e Externally registered domains can point at R53 Public Zone
